text:
A depiction of this is
shown in Figure 5. It is possible to formulate an optimization problem on
the surrogate to maximize RMI. Given this geometric setup,
maximum RMI should occur when the spline points are at
alternating extrema (e.g. x = [−0.25, 0.25, −0.25, 0.25] or
x = [0.25, −0.25, 0.25, −0.25]) as this creates the largest
initial perturbation which seeds RMI growth. Likewise, the
smallest RMI should occur when all of the spline points are
set to the same value, which results in no initial perturbation.
